summary: A massive battle unfolds at Lipa Castle as adventurers unexpectedly arrive to defend the stronghold against an undead army orchestrated by Perrion. Despite the betrayal by Count Ramon, the adventurers aggressively farm the enemies for experience points, drastically altering the planned outcome of the scenario. Amidst the chaos, Aldred stands his ground to protect the castle, narrowly avoiding his scripted death and witnessing the emergence of a new hero, eventually coming face-to-face with the awakened antagonist Perrion.
key_moments: Adventurers arrive in force to defend Lipa Castle, surprising the enemy forces.
Aldred fights to hold the line, narrowly escaping a scripted death while fighting alongside adventurers.
Perrion intervenes directly on the battlefield as an awakened enemy to confront the defenders.
